# programs.atop

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.atop`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.atop.atopRotateTimer.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the atop-rotate timer, which restarts the atop service daily to make sure the data files are rotate. |
| `programs.atop.atopService.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the atop service responsible for storing statistics for long-term analysis. |
| `programs.atop.atopacctService.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the atopacct service which manages process accounting. This allows Atop to gather data about processes that disappeared in between two refresh intervals. |
| `programs.atop.atopgpu.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to install and enable the atopgpud daemon to get information about NVIDIA gpus. |
| `programs.atop.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Atop, a tool for monitoring system resources. |
| `programs.atop.netatop.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to install and enable the netatop kernel module. Note: this sets the kernel taint flag "O" for loading out-of-tree modules. |
| `programs.atop.netatop.package` | `package` | Which package to use for netatop. |
| `programs.atop.package` | `package` | The atop package to use. |
| `programs.atop.settings` | `attribute set` | Parameters to be written to {file}`/etc/atoprc`. |
| `programs.atop.setuidWrapper.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to install a setuid wrapper for Atop. This is required to use some of the features as non-root user (e.g.: ipc information, netatop, atopgpu). Atop tries to drop the root privileges shortly after starting. |
